mapper.select: select id, scheduled_time, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status from scheduled_domain_locking_time where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select id, scheduled_time, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status from scheduled_domain_locking_time where is_deleted = 0 and status=#{status} order by scheduled_time asc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into scheduled_domain_locking_time(id, scheduled_time, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values (#{id}, #{scheduledTime}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{status})

insert into scheduled_domain_locking_time(id,scheduled_time, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.scheduledTime}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status})

insert into scheduled_domain_locking_time(id,scheduled_time, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.scheduledTime}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status})
on duplicate key update scheduled_time = values(scheduled_time), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time), status = values(status)
